# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

import jenkins.model.*
def call() {   // Declare the function as a 'call' to allow it be used in other functions or methods 
    pipeline {     // Start of Pipeline block, this is where all stages and steps are defined for JenkinPipeLine (Jenkisfile)
        environment{      // Define Environment Block which will contain details about the build server. This step should ideally be done once per agent or in a shared location 
            nodeName('slave')    // Set name of this specific Node to slave, it can also run on master if you want  
            
           }     // End environment block     
        
        stages {       // Starts the definition for multiple 'stages' which are executed in sequence. Each stage is a set of steps 
            stage('Download Artifact'){    // Define Stage and name it as "download artifact"  
                steps{                     // Defines Steps within this block, these will be run sequentially one after the other    
                    script {                 // Starts Script Block which contains all commands to execute in shell. 
                        withCredentials([[$class: 'UsernamePasswordMultiBinding', credentialsID: '', usernameVariable: 'USERNAME_VARIABLE', passwordVariable: 'PASSWORD_VARIABLE']])   // This block is used for handling the credential of Jenkins user, it should ideally be done once per agent or in a shared location 
                            sh '''#!/bin/bash -xe    # Define script as bash shell with error checking enabled.    
                                wget --quiet ${URL}'''   // Download build artifacts from external URL provided by Jenkins parameter ($url) and save it to local directory, this step should ideally be done once per agent or in a shared location 
                        '''    )      // End script block      
                    }     //End steps        
                }//end of withCredentials  
            },        /* end stage 'Download Artifact' */         
            
           ... (continue for all stages)...
